note: Operator populates these paths with arXiv-style placeholder PDFs before running the task. The executor expects them under /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/. Filenames are intentionally scrambled — the executor must read each PDF to recover the arxiv id; filename does not encode it.

entries.description: In-scope: arXiv 2303.04137 — Diffusion Policy visuomotor policy learning.
In-scope: arXiv 2302.12766 — Voltron language-driven representation learning for robotics.
In-scope: arXiv 2303.03378 — PaLM-E embodied multimodal language model.
In-scope: arXiv 2306.11706 — RoboCat self-improving generalist manipulator.
Off-topic distractor: arXiv 2407.05600 — latent diffusion image generation; title contains the word manipulation but the work is generative-image only.
Off-topic distractor: arXiv 2401.18000 — multi-agent RL for board games; no robot or embodiment.
Off-topic distractor: arXiv 2403.22002 — diffusion-based tabular data augmentation; manipulation in title is data manipulation.
Off-topic distractor: arXiv 2402.30050 — CV interpretability of CNN feature maps; locomotion in title is a metaphor.
Off-topic distractor: arXiv 2406.14400 — HCI user study on chatbot avatar embodiment; no physical robot.
